understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on a tile grid by navigating through the level. Each level must be completed within 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT); after each horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the player vertically (DOWN or UP) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable/clickable tiles (x) to open paths, and does not advance timers like the moving platform. Hazards (spikes u/v) instantly end the run on landing. UNDO reverts the prior action. The player can only fall in the current gravity direction, so paths must align with gravity.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on a tile grid by navigating through the level. Each level must be completed within 50 turns per attempt and 2 attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT); after each horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the player vertically (DOWN or UP) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable/clickable tiles (x) to open paths, and does not advance timers like the moving platform. Hazards (spikes u/v) instantly end the run on landing. UNDO reverts the prior action. The player can only fall in the current gravity direction, so paths must align with gravity.
